evidence.decolonization: Separates embroidery, rushnyk, sorochka, strii, ritual/domestic textile uses, regional technique, diaspora/revival, Soviet reframing, and modern identity without unchanged-pagan-code or single-canon claims.
evidence.pedagogy: C1+ seminar prose and V2 activities require learners to distinguish object, technique, body system, regional evidence, and source boundaries; the essay exemplar now matches the 260-word minimum.
evidence.review: Claude Opus 4.8 independent review found resource placeholders, quote attribution gaps, a YAML colon scalar, index plural agreement, missing sidecar, and short essay exemplar; all findings were fixed and MDX regenerated.
evidence.source_policy: Built from the dossier spine and corpus-verified literary fragments only; no invented motif dictionary, artifact IDs, museum objects, songs, captions, or universal regional claims.
